title: Session summary never writes to memory on exit
what_failed: On exit, '[Memory] Session summary saved' never printed. Session cost showed but no summary was written to Supabase.
where_failed: pi_agent.py run() exit block: 'if self.messages:' guard. _generate_session_summary() had no fallback to self.history.
why_likely: Dependent on T-006: self.messages was cleared on mode switch, so 'if self.messages:' was always False when last mode was normie. Also _generate_session_summary used _extract_text_from_messages only, with no fallback.
reproduction: 1. Start Pi. 2. Switch to root, have conversation, switch to normie. 3. Type exit. 4. Observe no '[Memory] Session summary saved'.
expected: Session summary written on every exit that had any conversation.
actual: Summary silently skipped. Cost displayed, no summary.
suggested_fix: Change guard to 'if self.messages or self.history:'. Add self.history fallback in _generate_session_summary().
